boundaries: Headless CI negative fixtures validate that the harness detects broken scene/objective/camera cases, not screenshot or visual QA.
Collision remains based on stable BoxShape3D/SphereShape3D proxy shapes, not mesh-accurate GLB collisions.
Layouts share the same imported asset set and local Godot runtime; no new assets, models, or display stack were installed.

negative_reports.expected_failure: readback rejects a scene with a route checkpoint removed

errors: checkpoint or collider missing for block

negative_reports.expected_failure: route trace diff rejects a wrong expected checkpoint order
finish must stay locked before all checkpoints are collected
scene builder gate rejects checkpoint sensors that do not clear the collider front
camera gate rejects an injected object between camera and player target

no_proxy_note: Godot run is local/offline on HomePC with proxy variables unset by the caller.
simulation_mode: local/offline HomePC Godot headless negative scene-CI fixtures over proxy scene nodes and deterministic physics assertions

visual_probe.reason: P17 does not retry or modify the blocked screenshot/display path and makes no visual QA claim.
